articles.title: Bitcoin At $47,000 Will Confirm Main Push To Astronomical Levels — PlanB
articles.description: Plan B, the founder of the Bitcoin Stock to Flow model, which is designed to assert the value of Bitcoin in the same way as other valuable assets, has reaffirmed that Bitcoin is headed for the top. articles.title: Bitcoin Prices Stall Near $46,000 As Bullish Momentum Builds
articles.description: Bitcoin prices have been trading near $46,000 after breaking through prior resistance. Several market observers weigh in on where the digital currency will likely go next.

articles.title: Co-Creator Of $27 Billion USDC Stablecoin Reveals Plans To Become A Full-Reserve National Commercial Bank
articles.description: Fresh off the announcement of a SPAC merger deal, USDC issuer Circle is setting sights on becoming the industry’s first full-reserve national commercial bank.
